      tagline:'The Innovation Primer certification is designed for individuals who want to transform from passive observers of change...',
      price:0, priceDisplay:'Free', duration:'2h', target:'Anyone',
      badge:'gimi-store-assets/v2/ip.png',
      description:'The Innovation Primer certification is designed for individuals who want to transform from passive observers of change into proactive drivers of value.
